creator: freebsd@michael-bueker.de
text:
Created attachment 218521
https://github.com/neomutt/neomutt/commit/6078653c9233644ca76c24bdb64e49bd443dd714

The last release has badly broken sidebar navigation. Given how central this feature is likely to be for many users, include this fix from upstream in the ports tree instead of waiting for the next release.
